name: Eye Irrigation — Chemical Exposure

cptCodes.display: Removal of foreign body, external eye; conjunctival superficial

diagnoses.display: Burn of right eyelid and periocular area, initial encounter

otherSuppliesUsed: Morgan lens, LR via tubing, proparacaine drops, pH paper
